steps: Deparaffinize slides and hydrate to ddH 2 O: A B 1 Compound Time 2 Xylenes 2 x 5 min 3 100% EtOH 2 x 1 min 4 95% EtOH 1 min each 5 80% EtOH 1 min each 6 70% EtOH 1 min each 7 ddH2O 1 min each
Filter undiluted Harris Hematoxylin and Eosin using Whatman #4 filter paper.
Immerse sections in filtered Harris Hematoxylin for 00:05:00 .
Rinse in 2 changes of ddH 2 O.
Differentiate in 0.1% acid alcohol solution: A B 1 Compound Time 2 EtOH fixed tissue 2 sec 3 NBF fixed tissue 4 sec
Rinse in tap H 2 O for 10- 00:15:00 or until sections turn bright blue.
Briefly rinse in tap H 2 O.
Dehydrate in: A B 1 Compound Time 2 95% EtOH 2 x 30 sec 3 100% EtOH 2 x 1 min 4 Xylene 2 x 5 min
creator: Michael Henderson
